posts.author: mfisher4 (Monique Fisher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently navigating a challenge involving guest access permissions across enterprise instances.

What are you trying to achieve

We are currently navigating a challenge involving guest access permissions across enterprise instances. Our organization and our corporate development team both operate under the same domain name but maintain separate Monday.com enterprise instances and distinct usage needs.

We have several active projects with our corporate developers, and recently attempted to add them as guests to our shareable boards to streamline collaboration and reduce email traffic. However, due to the shared domain, the platform does not allow guest-level access between our instances.

We would like to retain our licenses exclusively for our internal team while enabling our corporate developers to view and update shareable boards as guests.
